warnings: GRID DISAGREEMENT WITH t1: t1's independent read set grid_ref_is_free_text_not_grid_notation: true for this page. My independent read finds this page uses the identical dimension string (matching the master grid หน้า00_gridline.json, including the A'/A'' dummy extension confirmation) as หน้า29/35/36 -- see หน้า29_floor_plan.json warnings for full supporting evidence. Recommend grid_source-linked treatment.
This is the only mechanical sheet in the drawing set (M-01 of 1, per title block 'M-58108'), covering recommended AC/ceiling-fan/exhaust-grille placement for the ground floor.

Exact room-to-equipment pairing for the two 40 CFM ceiling fans / two 4x4 grilles and the two 120 CFM ceiling fans / two 6x6 grilles (precisely which unit serves which small room near the ซักล้าง/ห้องน้ำ cluster) is a best-effort reading from overlapping small labels; positions are approximate, consistent with t1's independent read of the same ambiguity.

No cost/BTU-sizing calculation basis (e.g. room area used to size 12,000/9,000 BTU) is shown on this sheet -- it only presents the recommended equipment and location, consistent with it being a mechanical layout plan rather than a load-calculation sheet.
